title: Brawlhalla
description:
Brawlhalla is and always will be 100% free to play. Plus with server regions across the world and over 125 million players, you can play with anyone and everyone no matter who you are or where you are.

Test your skill in Ranked 1v1, 2v2, and 3v3, then chill with your friends in modes like Capture the Flag and Volleybrawl, and survive as long as possible in Horde and Walker Attack.

From a werewolf with ice powers, to a space warrior who controls black holes, to a trickster god with a very large pet snake, to a fairy queen who rides a war beetle into battle, there is a Legend for everyone. And maybe next month there will be a new one for you, too.

What legendary battle will you play out? SpongeBob SquarePants & Darth Vader vs John Cena & Mega Man? What about Aang & Tiny Tina vs Rayman & Lara Croft? Or even Po & Heatblast vs Chun Li & Shovel Knight?

Brawlhalla is free to play on PC, Mac, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, iOS, and Android devices. With cross-play, that means anyone on any platform can play with you on your console, computer, or phone.

This project was completed with assistance from the Georgia Film Office, a division of the Georgia Department of Economic Development.
description_short: An epic platform fighter for up to 8 players online or local. Try casual free-for-alls, ranked matches, or invite friends to a private room. And it's free! Play cross-platform with millions of players on PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, iOS, Android & Steam! Frequent updates. Over sixty Legends.
